Home Sport Football

Sport

Football Lockers

Football equipment is bulky, heavy, and needs proper ventilation. Our football lockers are designed for helmets, pads, cleats, and uniforms while keeping everything organized and dry.

  • Spacious compartments for helmets and shoulder pads
  • Enhanced ventilation to prevent moisture buildup
  • Dedicated storage for cleats and footwear
  • Uniform hanging space and reinforced construction
Football Guide Get Quote

Semi Pro

$349.00

Entry-level wood locker. 3/4" solid wood construction, durable and ideal for schools and rec teams.

Dimensions: 24" W × 76" H × 19" D (Widths 18"–30")

Colors:
Maple
View product

Varsity

$449.00

Step-up design with 3/4" solid wood premium finish. Great for varsity and competitive programs.

Dimensions: 24" W × 76" H × 19" D (Widths 18"–30"; optional 4" base)

Colors:
Maple
View product

Pro

$549.00

MPW-6C plywood melamine construction. Reliable workhorse for team locker rooms. Ships in 3–4 weeks.

Dimensions: 24" W × 76" H × 19" D (Widths 18"–30"; optional 4" base)

Colors:
Black, Light Grey, Dark Grey, Maple
View product

Stadium

$599.00

Premium plywood melamine, stadium-grade. Heavy-duty build for high-traffic facilities. Ships in 3–4 weeks.

Dimensions: 24" W × 76" H × 19" D (Widths 18"–30"; optional 4" base)

Colors:
Black, Light Grey, Dark Grey, Maple
View product

Elite

$599.00

Top-tier locker. Curved design, premium materials. Quick Ship 2–4 weeks in select widths and colors.

Dimensions: 24" W × 76" H × 24" D (Widths 18"–30"; optional 4" base)

Colors:
Light Grey, Dark Grey, Black, Maple
View product

Legendary

$599.00

Top-tier locker. Curved design, maximum durability and customization. Custom build 8–12 weeks.

Dimensions: 24" W × 76" H × 24" D (Widths 18"–30"; optional 4" base)

Colors:
Black, Light Grey, Dark Grey, Maple
View product

Football equipment is bulky, heavy, and needs proper ventilation. Our football lockers are designed for helmets, pads, cleats, and uniforms while keeping everything organized and dry.

  • Spacious compartments for helmets and shoulder pads
  • Enhanced ventilation to prevent moisture buildup
  • Dedicated storage for cleats and footwear
  • Uniform hanging space and reinforced construction

Free design consultation. 30+ years experience, 5 year warranty.

PlayerStall

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks (Stadium & Elite) or custom wood, phenolic & more in 8–12 weeks. Price match guarantee. 30+ years experience.
